{{Infobox character
| name = Vordreith
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Vordreith]] is the [[Lady]] of the Just and an [[Arbiter]].}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Vordreith]] is an [[Arbiter]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
